meta_title: For Freelancers: debugging with AI to Solve slow development speed (Advanced Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome slow development speed. A Advanced-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Debugging with AI: Speed Up Development for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Master AI-assisted debugging to eliminate slow development cycles. Learn to use Antigravity and Claude Code to ship high-quality client projects faster.
content.answer_block: To eliminate slow development, integrate AI-driven debugging directly into your terminal workflow. By leveraging Antigravity for architectural context and Claude Code for iterative execution, you can automate bug identification and patch deployment. This reduces manual investigation time by 70%, allowing you to ship production-ready features for clients significantly faster.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, the client is waiting, and you are trapped in a recursive loop of 'why is this breaking?' Your IDE is cluttered, the console logs are a graveyard of cryptic errors, and your velocity has plummeted to zero. This is the silent killer of the freelance business model: the friction between intention and execution.

But the era of manual debugging is dead. By weaving AI agents directly into your CLI, you stop being a code-janitor and start being an architect. We are moving beyond simple autocomplete into autonomous problem-solving, where your development environment becomes a self-healing system.

steps.title: Establish Contextual Baselines
steps.description: Before debugging, you must map the current state of the codebase. Antigravity excels at indexing your architecture to ensure the AI understands the dependency graph.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project structure and identify the primary entry point and dependency graph for the failing module.

steps.title: Isolate the Error Surface
steps.description: Don't feed the AI the whole file. Isolate the stack trace and the specific logic block causing the bottleneck to ensure high-fidelity responses.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Trace the error in [file_path] back to the source implementation. Identify potential race conditions or unhandled promise rejections.

steps.title: Automated Hypothesis Testing
steps.description: Use Claude Code to draft potential fixes in a sandbox environment before applying them to your production branch.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Propose three refactoring solutions for this logic flow, prioritizing memory efficiency and error handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create a reproduction script for the identified bug'

steps.title: Iterative Patch Deployment
steps.description: Apply the fix using the AI agent, ensuring that it automatically runs the relevant unit tests to verify the patch.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement the chosen solution and update the existing test suite to cover this edge case.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'apply fix and run npm test'

steps.title: Post-Mortem Documentation
steps.description: Automatically document the fix to prevent technical debt and provide the client with a professional summary of the resolution.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Summarize this debugging session and generate a technical note for the client explaining the root cause and resolution.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate a markdown summary of the changes made'

pro_tips: Always run your AI agents with read-only access to system files to prevent unintended side effects during complex refactors.
Use a specific '.claude-ignore' file to prevent the agent from indexing large binary files or node_modules, keeping token usage efficient.
When debugging complex state issues, ask the agent to 'simulate a state machine' to visualize transitions before writing any code.
Chain your prompts: ask the agent to act as a 'Security Auditor' after a bug fix to ensure the new code doesn't introduce vulnerabilities.
Use CLI-based persistent sessions to keep the AI's context window alive throughout your entire workday.
content.next_steps: Configure your local environment by installing the Claude Code CLI and running a trial session on a non-critical side project to refine your prompt library.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting technical debt dictate your freelance schedule. Master these tools today and reclaim your billable hours. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
